premise: screenshots from a AAA video game themed around scaling SpaceX from going to the earth to Mars, use mechanics from Kerbal Space Program, cinematic photorealistic, 3x3 grid

designIntent.mechanics: design rocket -> launch -> manage delta-v during ascent -> orbital insertion -> trans-Mars injection -> Mars landing -> earn contract reward -> repeat

concept.prompt: A 3x3 grid of cinematic photorealistic AAA video game screenshots for a SpaceX-to-Mars KSP-style space simulation. Panel 1: Rocket assembly bay interior, Starship-inspired vehicle on assembly tower, dramatic industrial lighting, technicians in suits for scale, HUD overlay showing mass/thrust stats. Panel 2: Launch sequence, Starship lifting off from pad with massive engine exhaust bloom, camera low angle, flame trench glow, smoke billowing, altitude and velocity gauges in dark UI corners. Panel 3: Ascent trajectory, rocket climbing through atmosphere, Earth curvature visible below, blue atmospheric gradient fading to black space, delta-v bar depleting in HUD. Panel 4: Orbital insertion burn, engine firing in the vacuum of space, Earth fully visible as a sphere below, orbital map overlay showing Ap/Pe markers and trajectory arc. Panel 5: Trans-Mars injection burn, deep space black backdrop, engine glow illuminating ship hull, porkchop-plot trajectory window in corner UI, countdown timer. Panel 6: Mars approach, rust-red planet filling half the frame, thin atmosphere halo, ship silhouetted, approach vector and deceleration burn gauge on HUD. Panel 7: Mars EDL (entry descent landing), heat shield glowing orange-red, plasma trail, parachute deployment sequence, altimeter spinning down rapidly. Panel 8: Mars surface operations, astronaut near landed Starship on dusty red regolith, distant red mountains, sunrise lighting casting long shadows, resource collection UI. Panel 9: Contract reward screen, mission complete overlay, Earth and Mars connected by dashed trajectory line, credits earned counter, dark UI with orange and white accents, cinematic letterbox. Overall aesthetic: deep space blacks, dramatic rocket exhaust glow, photorealistic lighting, SpaceX Starship design language, dark HUD with orange/white accents.

styleGuide.lighting: High-contrast dramatic lighting with bright engine flames and glowing thrust against dark space and Martian surfaces
styleGuide.perspective: Mixed perspective including launch pad close-ups, orbital mechanics views, planetary approaches, and surface operations
styleGuide.scale: Epic scale ranging from intimate spacecraft details to planetary vistas and interplanetary trajectories
styleGuide.mood: Ambitious, futuristic, technical, exploratory with hints of triumph and wonder
styleGuide.era: Near-future science fiction, contemporary space exploration aesthetic

plan.title: SpaceX: Mars Colonization Initiative
plan.tagline: From launchpad to the red planet — every kilogram of delta-v counts.

designIntent.coreMechanics: Assemble Starship-style rocket in VAB -> ignite engines and manage throttle through Max-Q -> execute orbital insertion burn (Ap and Pe both above 200 km) -> execute trans-Mars injection burn consuming the delta-v budget -> coast to Mars approach corridor -> perform deorbit and EDL sequence -> touch down on Mars surface at low vertical speed -> collect contract reward and repeat with next mission tier
designIntent.winCondition: Vehicle touches down on Mars surface with vertical speed below 5 m/s and fuel remaining above 0
designIntent.loseCondition: Vehicle crashes (vertical speed at impact > 5 m/s), runs out of fuel before Mars landing, or exceeds maximum dynamic pressure without throttle-down causing structural failure
designIntent.loopLength: 90 seconds per compressed simulation loop (real-time compressed: ascent 20s, orbit 15s, TMI 10s, transit 5s, approach 15s, EDL 15s, reward 10s)

keyboard.throttleUp: W / Up Arrow — increase engine throttle
keyboard.throttleDown: S / Down Arrow — decrease engine throttle
keyboard.pitchManeuver: A / D — pitch/yaw for gravity turn

touch.throttle: Vertical drag on left side of screen — throttle up/down
touch.steer: Joystick on right side — pitch and yaw

gamepad.throttle: Right trigger (RT) — throttle up; Left trigger (LT) — throttle down

loopSteps.label: Rocket Assembled
loopSteps.description: Player confirms rocket design in the Vehicle Assembly Bay and commits to launch. Stats panel shows total mass, thrust, and TWR meeting mission requirements.

inputHint.keyboard: Enter — confirm assembly and proceed to launchpad
inputHint.touch: Tap LAUNCH VEHICLE button in assembly HUD

loopSteps.label: Liftoff
loopSteps.description: All 33 Raptor engines ignite, vehicle clears the launch tower. Altitude exceeds 100 m. Throttle displayed at 100% in HUD.

inputHint.keyboard: W or Up Arrow — throttle to 100% then Space to ignite
inputHint.touch: Drag left throttle slider to maximum, tap IGNITE
inputHint.gamepad: Hold RT fully, press A to ignite

loopSteps.label: Max-Q Throttle Management
loopSteps.description: Vehicle reaches ~12 km altitude, max dynamic pressure. Player must throttle down to avoid structural failure, then throttle back up once past max-Q. Delta-v budget gauge updates.

inputHint.keyboard: S / Down Arrow — reduce throttle through max-Q region
inputHint.touch: Drag left throttle slider down briefly, then back up
inputHint.gamepad: Release RT partially through max-Q, then re-apply

loopSteps.label: Orbital Insertion
loopSteps.description: Player executes the circularization burn. Apoapsis and periapsis both rise above 200 km. Orbital map shows closed ellipse around Earth with Ap/Pe markers.

inputHint.keyboard: W — hold throttle through circularization burn until Ap/Pe both > 200 km
inputHint.touch: Hold throttle slider at burn level, watch orbital map
inputHint.gamepad: Hold RT through burn; release when orbit closes

loopSteps.label: Trans-Mars Injection
loopSteps.description: Player executes the TMI burn at the optimal departure window (porkchop plot shown). Full delta-v budget consumed. Time-to-Mars countdown begins.

inputHint.keyboard: Enter — execute burn at porkchop-plot optimal window
inputHint.touch: Tap EXECUTE BURN when window opens
inputHint.gamepad: A button — execute burn at window

loopSteps.label: Mars Approach
loopSteps.description: Vehicle enters Mars sphere of influence, within 50,000 km. Mars fills the viewport. Player initiates deorbit burn to set up EDL trajectory.

inputHint.keyboard: Enter — execute deorbit burn; W to manage throttle
inputHint.touch: Tap EXECUTE DEORBIT, drag throttle as needed

loopSteps.label: Mars Landing
loopSteps.description: Vehicle survives EDL: aerobraking, chute deployment, landing burn. Touches down on Mars surface with vertical speed below 5 m/s. Landing legs deploy automatically.

inputHint.keyboard: S — throttle landing burn to slow descent; Space — deploy chutes
inputHint.touch: Drag throttle to manage descent rate, tap DEPLOY CHUTES
inputHint.gamepad: LT to throttle landing burn; A to deploy chutes

loopSteps.label: Contract Complete
loopSteps.description: Mission complete screen appears. Earth-to-Mars trajectory arc shown with dashed line. Funds, Reputation, and Science rewards tallied. Player taps Continue to restart loop.

inputHint.keyboard: Enter — collect reward and return to assembly
inputHint.touch: Tap CONTINUE on contract complete screen

scene.camera: Dynamic third-person chase camera tracking vehicle, transitions to cinematic locked angles at key events (launch, orbital insertion, Mars approach, landing)
scene.skybox: Phase-dependent: Earth launch pad environment -> blue atmosphere gradient -> deep space star field -> Mars approach (rust planet dominant) -> Mars surface red sky
scene.lighting: Directional sun light with high contrast; engine exhaust point lights (orange-white) during burns; Mars surface: low-angle warm rust-toned sunlight with long shadows; deep space: ambient near-zero with strong specular on hull

hud: Delta-v budget bar (initial / spent / remaining, right panel)
Stage status indicator (Stage 1 / Stage 2 / TMI, left panel)
Mission phase label (LAUNCH / MAX-Q / ORBITAL INSERTION / TMI / MARS APPROACH / EDL / SURFACE, top-left)
Orbital map mini overlay (Ap/Pe markers, active during orbital phases)
Porkchop plot window (active during TMI window phase)
EDL sequence checklist (active during Mars EDL: aerobrake, chutes, landing burn, touchdown)
menus: Vehicle Assembly Bay screen (pre-launch: mass/TWR/delta-v summary, VESSEL/RESOURCES/STAGING/SETTINGS tabs)
Contract Complete overlay (mission success: funds/reputation/science rewards, MISSION SUMMARY / CONTINUE buttons)
Mission Failed overlay (crash or fuel exhaustion: reason text, RETRY / MAIN MENU buttons)
ui.style: Dark semi-transparent panels (#1a1a1a at 85% opacity), orange (#FF6B1A) accent lines and active-state highlights, white readout text, monospace font for telemetry values, thin hairline borders, cinematic letterbox bars during cutscene transitions

plan.audioMood: Orchestral tension with deep bass rumble on launch, soaring strings during orbital phases, eerie silence in deep space punctuated by engine burns, triumphant brass swell on Mars landing and contract reward
moodBoard: panel-01: VAB interior — Starship S25 on assembly tower, industrial haze, HUD telemetry overlay, SpaceX technicians for scale
panel-02: Launch — full-frame engine exhaust bloom, mechazilla tower silhouette, smoke plume, 100% throttle dial, low camera angle
panel-03: Ascent — Earth curvature below, blue atmosphere fading to black, delta-v budget depleting, max-Q annotation
panel-04: Orbital insertion — engine glow against Earth sphere, orbital map Ap/Pe markers at ~250 km, deep black vacuum
panel-05: TMI burn — deep space, porkchop plot, time-to-Mars countdown 169 days, engine exhaust illuminating hull silver
panel-06: Mars approach — rust-red planet filling frame, thin atmosphere halo, deorbit burn UI, LOCK MARS button
panel-07: EDL — heat shield orange-red plasma glow, parachute canopies deployed, EDL sequence checklist, altimeter 1.2 km
panel-08: Surface operations — landed Starship on rust regolith, astronaut for scale, red mountains, resource harvester UI, Sol counter
panel-09: Contract complete — Earth-to-Mars dashed arc, MARS COLONIZATION INITIATIVE title, funds +32.45M / reputation +750 / science +1250
plan.winCondition: mars_landing event fires with vertical speed < 5 m/s, followed by contract_reward event
plan.loseCondition: Vehicle impact speed > 5 m/s on any surface, OR fuel exhausted before mars_landing event fires
